title: Add priority to todos
outcome: Users can mark how urgent a todo is when creating it.
inScope: Optional priority on create (low|medium|high), default medium

acceptanceCriteria.statement: Given a valid title, when a todo is created without priority, then it is stored with priority medium.
Given a valid title and priority high, when a todo is created, then the stored todo has priority high.
Given an invalid priority value, when a todo is created, then the API returns 400 and no todo is created.

successDefinition: Automated checks for AC-1..AC-3 pass via ./run-checks.sh.
notes: Demo sample for ai-engineering-squad Epic F.
